bool detectCapitalUse(string word) {
    // Check case 1: all uppercase
    bool case1 = true;
    for (char c : word) {

            break;

    // Check case 2: all lowercase
    bool case2 = true;
    for (char c : word) {
        if (!islower(c)) {
            case2 = false;
            break;
        }
    }
    if (case2) return true;
    
    // Check case3: first is upper, rest are lower
    if (word.length() == 0) return false;
    bool firstUpper = isupper(word[0]);
    if (!firstUpper) return false;
    for (size_t i = 1; i < word.length(); ++i) {
        if (!islower(word[i])) return false;
    }
    return true;
}

#include <cctype>

class Solution {
public:
    bool detectCapitalUse(string word) {
        // Check case 1: all uppercase
        bool case1 = true;
        for (char c : word) {
            if (!isupper(c)) {
                case1 = false;
                break;
            }
        }
        if (case1) return true;
        
        // Check case 2: all lowercase
        bool case2 = true;
        for (char c : word) {
            if (!islower(c)) {
                case2 = false;
                break;
            }
        }
        if (case2) return true;
        
        // Check case3: first is upper, rest are lower
        if (word.empty()) return false; // but constraints say word.length >=1
        if (!isupper(word[0])) return false;
        for (int i = 1; i < word.size(); ++i) {
            if (!islower(word[i])) return false;
        }
        return true;
    }
};

class Solution {

    bool detectCapitalUse(string word) {
        // Check case 1: all uppercase

            if (!isupper(c)) {
                case1 = false;
                break;

        // Check case 2: all lowercase

            if (!islower(c)) {

                break;
            }

        if (case2) return true;

        if (!isupper(word[0])) return false;
        for (int i = 1; i < word.size(); ++i) {
            if (!islower(word[i])) return false;
        }
        return true;
    }
};
